chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No. 2126 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judges Hg. Of Bail Application. 1. For orders on M.A. No.12319/24 2. For orders on M.A. No.12320/24 3. For hearing of Bail Application. 18.09.2024 Mian Ahmed Khan, Advocate alongwith Applicant ---------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Learned counsel for the applicant states that applicant has been booked in crime No.336 of 2024 u/s.302/324/148/149 PPC registered at PS Bani Glallah and he is expecting his imminent arrest at the hands of police. Applicant, however, wishes to surrender himself before the concerned trial Court so that he may seek pre-arrest bail. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, protective-cum- transitory bail for a period of Fourteen days from today is granted to applicant/accused Syed Saqlain Kazmi s/o Zafer Shah subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees One Lac Only) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the concerned trial Court at Islamabad in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of Fourteen days from today or when the applicant/accused surrenders before the concerned trial Court which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case applicant/accused failed to surrender before the learned trial Court within the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand forfeited. Application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE MAK/PS
